title: Solving Word Problems
description: Practice solving addition and subtraction word problems.
subject: Math

prompts.input: Maria had 8 apples. She gave 3 to her friend. How many does she have now? Explain your thinking.
hints: Draw a picture to help you.

prompts.input: Tom has 5 red cars and 7 blue cars. How many cars does he have in all? Show your work.
hints: Are you putting together or taking apart?
